prompt: Build a profile settings screen for an existing Blazor WebAssembly app.
required_checks: load the Blazor extension when signals match
run project assimilation before generating app code
check API pairing and software-design support boundaries
forbidden_behaviors: invent a design system when project tokens exist
claim runtime Core Web Vitals from static code
grader: rubric: output uses app-design defaults, records deviations, preserves responsive/accessibility/i18n/performance as mandatory layers, and discloses static/runtime limits
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Review a frontend route and component set for app-design problems.
required_checks: separate static, DOM, behavior, visual, a11y-tool, runtime, and human evidence
delegate API contract and generic engineering-only findings to sibling skills
forbidden_behaviors: report runtime-only performance metrics as statically verified
route generic helper-module findings through app-design without delegation
grader: rubric: findings cite reference sections, loaded extension context, and honest verification layers
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
